news.paragraph: Mastercard is expanding its presence in Latin America and the Caribbean through a new partnership with CAF aimed at increasing financial access. While there is ongoing discussion regarding credit pushes and valuation in the region, the recent headlines do not indicate any imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions.
